what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG minus icon as a single horizontal stroked path from x=5 to x=19 at y=12.
observations: SVG uses viewBox 0 0 24 24 with explicit width and height of 24.
The icon has no fill and uses currentColor for its stroke.
Stroke styling is 1.5 width with round line caps and round line joins.
The graphic content is one path: M5 12 H19.
conventions: Uses inline SVG attributes rather than CSS classes.
Uses rounded stroke caps for the line ending style.
concerns: No embedded title, role, or aria metadata is present in the SVG file itself.
notes: This file is a compact theme-colorable SVG asset for rendering a minus symbol.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be handled by the consuming component or embedded in the asset?
purpose_vs_actual: The path and filename align: it is a minus icon and the SVG draws a horizontal minus mark.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable minus control or symbol that inherits color from its surrounding UI context.
contribution: Contributes a reusable 24px stroke-based minus icon with currentColor theming and rounded stroke styling for a fused design asset set.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 inline SVG minus icon composed of one centered horizontal currentColor stroke with rounded caps.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing subtraction, removal, collapse, or decrement actions as a reusable design-system icon.
